name: sehgal-vip.github.io
description: A beautiful, minimalist blog built with Jekyll for GitHub Pages. Features a powerful command palette (⌘K), dark/light mode, and a zero-code publishing workflow.

scripts.build:js: cat assets/js/theme-toggle.js assets/js/command-palette.js assets/js/search.js assets/js/main.js assets/js/ripple-effect.js | npx esbuild --minify > assets/js/main.bundle.min.js
